stories.story: As a workflow author, I want to call continue_as_new with a carried payload so that my long-running workflow can run indefinitely without accumulating unbounded history.
As a workflow author, I want continue_as_new to fail loudly if I have pending activities so that I don't accidentally lose in-flight work.
As an operator, I want to see the full chain of continuations for a workflow so that I can trace its complete execution history across runs.
As an engine developer, I want ContinuedAsNew to be a proper terminal status so that recovery skips old runs and only replays the current one.
As a workflow author, I want to continue-as-new into a different workflow type so that I can migrate running workflows to new code.
